title: Successful user registration with valid credentials and confirmation email receipt
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Network connection is stable
Email service is operational

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed with fields for email and password

steps.action: Enter a valid, unique email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated with 'valid.user.1@example.com'

steps.action: Enter a valid password (at least 8 characters) into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters. Registration button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to a 'Registration Successful' or 'Check your email' page/message. No error messages displayed.

steps.action: Check the inbox for 'valid.user.1@example.com' for a confirmation email
steps.expected_result: A confirmation email with subject 'Confirm your account' (or similar) is received from the application. The email contains a confirmation link.

steps.action: Click the confirmation link in the received email
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to the application and a 'Email Confirmed' message is displayed. User account status is updated to 'confirmed'.

title: Successful user registration with a complex, valid password
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Network connection is stable
Email service is operational

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed with fields for email and password

steps.action: Enter a valid, unique email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated with 'complex.pass.user@example.net'

steps.action: Enter a complex password (more than 8 characters, special chars, numbers, mixed case) into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters. Registration button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to a 'Registration Successful' or 'Check your email' page/message. No error messages displayed.

steps.action: Verify a confirmation email is sent to 'complex.pass.user@example.net'
steps.expected_result: A confirmation email is received from the application containing a confirmation link.

title: Attempt to register with an already existing email address
preconditions: User 'valid.user.1@example.com' is already registered (from ZT-4-TC-001-POSITIVE)
User is on the registration page

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter the email address of an already registered user into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated with 'valid.user.1@example.com'

steps.action: Enter a valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters. Registration button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button
steps.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Email already registered' or 'This email is already in use' is displayed on the page. User is not registered and remains on the registration page.

title: Attempt to register with a password less than 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter a unique valid email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated with 'shortpass@example.com'

steps.action: Enter a password that is less than 8 characters long (e.g., 7 characters)
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters. Registration button may be disabled or an immediate validation error message appears.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button (if enabled)
steps.expected_result: An error message indicating 'Password must be at least 8 characters' is displayed. User is not registered and remains on the registration page.

title: Successful registration with password exactly 8 characters long
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Network connection is stable
Email service is operational

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter a valid, unique email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated with 'eightcharpass@example.net'

steps.action: Enter a password that is exactly 8 characters long
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters. Registration button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to a 'Registration Successful' or 'Check your email' page/message. No error messages displayed.

steps.action: Verify a confirmation email is sent to 'eightcharpass@example.net'
steps.expected_result: A confirmation email is received from the application containing a confirmation link.

title: Successful registration with maximum allowed password length (assuming 64 characters)
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Network connection is stable
Email service is operational
Maximum password length is 64 characters

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter a valid, unique email address into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated with 'longpassuser@example.org'

steps.action: Enter a password that is exactly 64 characters long
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters. The password field should accept the full 64 characters without truncation. Registration button is enabled.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button
steps.expected_result: User is redirected to a 'Registration Successful' or 'Check your email' page/message. No error messages displayed.

steps.action: Verify a confirmation email is sent to 'longpassuser@example.org'
steps.expected_result: A confirmation email is received from the application containing a confirmation link.

title: Verify real-time UI validation feedback for email format and password length
preconditions: User is on the registration page

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter an invalid email format into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: A real-time error message like 'Please enter a valid email address' appears below the email field. Registration button remains disabled.

steps.action: Correct the email format to a valid one (but not necessarily unique yet)
steps.expected_result: The email format error message disappears. Registration button may still be disabled if password is not valid.

steps.action: Enter a password less than 8 characters into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: A real-time error message like 'Password must be at least 8 characters' appears below the password field. Registration button remains disabled.

steps.action: Increase the password length to exactly 8 characters
steps.expected_result: The password length error message disappears. The registration button becomes enabled, assuming all other fields are valid.

title: Attempt SQL Injection in Email field during registration
preconditions: User is on the registration page

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter a SQL Injection payload into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The application should either reject the input due to invalid email format, sanitize the input, or escape special characters. No SQL error messages should be displayed to the user. Registration button might be disabled due to invalid email format.

steps.action: Enter a valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button (if enabled)
steps.expected_result: The application should prevent registration with the injected email. An error message related to invalid email format should be displayed. There should be no signs of database errors or successful injection (e.g., unintended registration, data exposure).

title: Attempt XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) in Email field during registration
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Ability to view system logs or received emails (if email is reflected in subject/body)

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter an XSS payload into the 'Email' field
steps.expected_result: The application should ideally reject the input due to invalid email format or sanitize the input. The browser should NOT execute the script. The registration button may be disabled.

steps.action: Enter a valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button (if enabled)
steps.expected_result: The application should prevent registration with the XSS payload. No pop-up alert should appear. If a confirmation email is sent, the email address (if reflected) should be properly escaped in the email body/subject.

steps.action: If registration was allowed, attempt to log in and navigate to a profile page where the email might be displayed.
steps.expected_result: No XSS alert should fire, and the email should be displayed as plain text (escaped) on any profile or user management pages.

title: Attempt to register with an invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the registration page

steps.action: Navigate to the user registration page
steps.expected_result: Registration form is displayed

steps.action: Enter an email address with an incorrect format (missing '@' and domain)
steps.expected_result: Email field is populated. A real-time validation error message 'Please enter a valid email address' (or similar) should appear. Registration button should be disabled.

steps.action: Enter a valid password into the 'Password' field
steps.expected_result: Password field is populated with masked characters.

steps.action: Click the 'Register' button (if enabled)
steps.expected_result: The application displays an error message 'Please enter a valid email address'. User is not registered and remains on the registration page. No new user account is created.
